case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF ASPIRE VISA VS. KRAIG A. SHRAWDER et al

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF ASPIRE VISA AS TO DEFENDANT SHRAWDER, KRAIG A.
